title.en: The Alomu Ancient Demon decided, so he let Ye T...

content.en:
The Ancient Demon said: "Aromu Ancient Demon, we can't make a move, in this special period, if we make a move, it will easily cause a big battle between the ultimate ancient demons, and that opportunity will destroy the plan." "

"Then let our clan's powerful peak ancient demon-level powerhouse kill the peak ancient demon-level powerhouse of Dom's main department!"

Who can make a move, after all, the peak ancient demon level powerhouse makes a strong move, what if the ultimate ancient demon level of the main department of Dom makes a move?

They can endure it themselves, and the ultimate ancient demon of the main Dom may not be able to provoke it.

Therefore, the peak ancient demon-level powerhouse who shot was at risk of being killed.

"Let the Heavenly Ancient Demon go, he owes us a chance to make a move, even if he really falls, our Luo Mother will not have any loss. "The Ancient Demon Dao.

"Let the Heavenly Ancient Demon make a move, that little guy's talent is indeed good, and now he has also broken through to the realm of a peak ancient demon-level powerhouse, his combat power should not be weak, and it must be no problem to kill a weaker peak ancient demon-level powerhouse. "

The Alomu Ancient Demon decided, so he let Ye Tian take action.

"Stygian Ancient Demon, you know the Heavenly Ancient Demon, this matter is up to you!"

"Good!"

The Ancient Demon nodded.

...... 420

Eagle Ministry.

Ye Tian was cultivating in his own dojo.

Suddenly, a figure appeared outside the dojo, and the ultimate particles in the ultimate void seemed to freeze.

It's the ultimate ancient demon here!

"I've seen the Ancient Demon of the Stygian!"

Ye Tian shouted very respectfully.

"Heavenly Ancient Demon, you owe the Arrow Mother Main Department a chance to make a move, and this time you need to attack and kill the peak Ancient Demon level powerhouse of the Dom Main Division. The Ancient Demon said directly, without beating around the bush.

"Good!"

Ye Tian directly agreed, and did not ask who to kill.

Subsequently.

The Stygian Ancient Demon informed Ye Tian of the specific attack and killing plan, and asked Li Changsheng to at least kill a peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse, and if there were many peak-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouses killed, he could also get the reward of the main department of the Arrow Mother.

But Ye Tian also knew very well that if he killed the peak ancient demon-level powerhouse of the main department of Dom, he would definitely be targeted by the main department of Dom.

So, Ye Tian asked: "The Stygian Ancient Demon, if the Ultimate Ancient Demon of the Dom Main Department makes a move and chases down the territory of the Arrow Mother's main department, I hope that several Ultimate Ancient Demons of the Arrow Mother's Main Department will help stop it (CDBA)." "

"Don't worry, we won't allow the ultimate ancient demon of the main Dom to enter the abyss of Arromu!"

The Ancient Demon of the Underworld is assured.

She definitely won't help Ye Tian, but everyone has come in, and the main department of Ah Luo's mother will definitely stop it, and she doesn't need Ye Tian to remind her at all.

"Then I'm relieved!"

Ye Tiandao.

......

Dom main department.

Ever since they had killed a peak ancient demon-level powerhouse of the Luo Mother's main department, they were also worried about the revenge of the Luo Mother's main department.

As a result, some time passed, but there was no reaction from the main department of Arrow's mother.

However, the main department of Dom still stared at the strong man of the main department of the mother of Arrow, and prevented the main department of the mother of Arrow from suddenly attacking the main department of Dom.

this day.

The three peak ancient demon-level powerhouses of the main department of Dom have teamed up to explore a new treasure land in the Endless Space-Time Domain.

And this news was spied on by the ultimate ancient demon of the main department of Ah Luo's mother, and Ye Tian was informed of the news.

For the first time, Ye Tian rushed over, and the information of the three peak ancient demon-level powerhouses also came into Ye Tian's mind.

"The strength of only one peak Ancient Demon level powerhouse is quite good, and the other two are ordinary peak Ancient Demon level powerhouses!"

Ye Tian knew the strength of the other party, and there was no trace of worry in his heart, in fact, even if it was a powerful peak ancient demon-level powerhouse, he was sure to kill it, unless the other party had a special life-saving thing.

......

"It's here!"

Ye Tian came to a special Huoyan river full of fire-type ultimate particles, and those three peak ancient demon-level powerhouses were here.

Soon, Ye Tian locked the other party's position.

Ye Tian immediately shuttled over.

Somewhere in the Huoyan River.

The Fengxi Ancient Demon was absorbing wisps of energy from a special river section, and this wisps of energy gradually condensed into a drop of special liquid.

"This is a brand-new energy substance, this drop is enough to make an ordinary Ancient Demon-level cultivator skyrocket, collect some of them, and bring them back to the main headquarters of Dom, which can cultivate a group of Ancient Demon-level powerhouses. "Fengxi Ancient Demon Dao.

"Hmm!"

The other two peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses nodded.

"We're faster, this is also a treasure land that has just been bred, and other peak ancient demon-level powerhouses may come over soon. "

The three of them at the peak of the Ancient Demon level powerhouses began to condense this special substance.

But suddenly, Ye Tian descended here, making their faces change.

Because Ye Tian was full of killing intent, he almost didn't hide it.

"Do it!"

The three peak ancient demon-level powerhouses shot out in unison.

However.

Ye Tian's Extreme Dao Ultimate Sword Realm shrouded him, and these three peak Ancient Demon level powerhouses had almost no power to resist.

Puff!!

Their bodies were torn apart, and Ye Tian used the body of the remnant demon again, killing the Fengxi Ancient Demon who had been severely injured and dying.

As for the other two peak ancient demon-level powerhouses, they had already died in the first wave of attacks in the Extreme Dao Ultimate Sword Realm.

It can be said that in less than one breath, these three peak ancient demon-level powerhouses have fallen.

"Run!"

Ye Tian quickly fled and headed towards the Abyss of Aromu.

And the Ultimate Ancient Demon of the main department of Dom knew the fall of the three peak ancient demon-level powerhouses of the main department for the first time, and sacrificed an Extreme Ultimate Treasure to explore Ye Tian's location.

Immediately after, an Ultimate Ancient Demon tore apart the Endless Void at a certain price, and from a long distance, he killed Ye Tian with one blow.

And just when Ye Tian was about to arrive at the Abyss of Aromu, the attack of this ultimate ancient demon came.

Because it was sudden, the Ultimate Ancient Demon of the main department of Arrow Mother didn't pay attention to the situation here, and it was too late to make a move.

But at this time, Ye Tian used the ultimate arcane technique of the Time Sword Move, and then cast the Solid of Time to freeze the opponent's attack.

Click!!!

The Solid of Time was shattered, and the Time Sword Cover was not able to block it, it was shattered, but the remaining attacks did not shatter Ye Tian's many forms and the body of the Extreme Life Pattern.

In the end, Ye Tian survived, and only suffered minor injuries.

Swish!

Ye Tian crossed over again and successfully returned to the Abyss of Aromu.

At this time, three ultimate ancient demons came to the main department of Dom, but they were intercepted by the ultimate ancient demons of the main department of Arrow.
